text: Dear Francesco , thank you very much! Milmedika team!

translations.sr: Dragi Francesco, hvala vam mnogo! Milmedika tim!
translations.sr_cyrl: Драги Francesco, хвала вам много! Milmedika тим!
translations.en: Dear Francesco , thank you very much! Milmedika team!
translations.ru: Уважаемый Francesco, большое спасибо! Команда Milmedika!
translations.de: Lieber Francesco, vielen herzlichen Dank! Milmedika-Team!
translations.tr: Sevgili Francesco, çok teşekkür ederiz! Milmedika ekibi!
